_README: Provenance + licensing source-of-truth for the Phase 1 RAG corpus. MANUAL VERIFICATION REQUIRED before trusting this file. Fields you MUST verify by hand: 'source_url' (all set to TODO_VERIFY — never auto-generated), 'license' and 'tier' (the public/ vs raw/ folder split is a guess, not proof), and any 'title' with a 'notes' flag (filename typos/sanitization). 'document' citations in the API should render from 'title', not from the raw filename.
_verification_checklist: Fill every source_url with the exact canonical page you downloaded from.
Confirm each tier-1 item is genuinely US-government public domain (OSHA/NIOSH/EPA).
Confirm each tier-2 item is vendor-copyrighted and must stay gitignored (not redistributed).
Resolve 'controls-hazardous-energies' — identify the actual publisher/source; it overlaps 1910.147.
Fix flagged filename issues: 'Chlorin'->Chlorine, 'Nutrient'->likely 'Nutrien', colons in Fisher filenames.
